Book a Class

Wellness for Every Body & Every Age

Revolutionary Wellness

Move. Breathe. Thrive. Together.

Joyful, inclusive fitness programs where every age, ability, and body is celebrated. From little ones discovering the world through yoga to seniors reclaiming their strength with laughter — movement transforms lives at every stage.

Explore Programs Meet Tami

✨ Stories spark imagination · Yoga builds confidence · Water sets you free ✨

What We Offer

Three Programs. One Mission.

Inclusive, joyful movement for every stage of life — kids, seniors, and everyone in between.

📖

Ages 4–6 · At the Library

Story Time Yoga

Where stories and movement come together!

An interactive class pairing picture books with yoga poses. Little minds and bodies thrive through imagination, breath, and playful movement.

Learn More →
💺

Seniors & All Abilities

Sassy Seat

Chair fitness with heart, humor & movement!

A fun, uplifting 45–50 min chair-based fitness class with music, laughter, and community. Every body welcome, no mat required.

Learn More →
💧

All Fitness Levels · AEA Certified

Water Aerobics

Low impact. High energy. In the water!

Joint-friendly water-based fitness building strength, cardio endurance, and flexibility. Perfect for all levels including those recovering from injury.

Learn More →
T
Tami Kraeger

Meet Your Instructor

Tami Kraeger

Tami brings energy, creativity, and heart to every single class — helping kids grow stronger, calmer, and more confident one story and pose at a time, while helping older adults and those with limited mobility continue to move with confidence, dignity, and joy.

With a background spanning wellness, group fitness, hospitality, and safety leadership as a former flight attendant and business owner, Tami creates classes that are welcoming, safe, empowering, and genuinely fun.

500+ Hr RYT AEA Aqua Fit Silver Sneakers Cosmic Kids Yoga Child Development Mindfulness

Our Belief

"Movement is a gift that belongs to everyone — at every age, every ability, every stage of life."
— Tami Kraeger, Revolutionary Wellness
Inclusive Joyful Empowering Community-First Evidence-Based Heart-Led

Get in Touch

Ready to Move Together?

Whether you're a parent looking for Story Time Yoga, a senior ready for Sassy Seat, or swimming toward something new — we'd love to see you.
